title: Citi Downgrades Crypto Outlook as Digital Asset Legislation Slows
message_html: Citi Downgrades Crypto Outlook as Digital Asset Legislation Slows ...
snippet: Citigroup has reportedly reduced its 12-month forecast for bitcoin and ethereum. The downgrade is due in part to slow progress on cryptocurrency legislation in the U.S., Reuters reported Tuesday (March. 17). Movement on the crypto market structure legislation known as the Clarity Act has stalled in
